name: 15p_acrocentric_shore
description: Chr15 acrocentric p-arm proximal to the NOR and distal to the centromere. Composed of DJ/PJ inter-acrocentric SD modules, beta-satellite, gamma-satellite, and HSat3 blocks at >95% identity recurring on all five acrocentrics. T2T-CHM13 first resolves this region; GRCh38 leaves it as a gap interval. NOR proper is documented at /ribosomal/chr15_NOR.json.

architecture.internal_structure: DJ and PJ acrocentric duplicons (1-100 kb modules at 95-99% identity) interleaved with HSat3, beta-satellite, gamma-satellite, and rDNA tail; ectopic NAHR with chr13p/14p/21p/22p drives Robertsonian translocations rob(13;15), rob(14;15), rob(15;21), rob(15;22).
